title: The Selkirk Grace.
content:
Some hae meat and canna eat,
            And some wad eat that want it;
        But we hae meat and we can eat,
            And sae the Lord be thanket.
meaning:
Robert Burns's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "The Selkirk Grace."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
